chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI C.P. No.D-6259 of 2019 Mst. Syeda Anisa Bano Versus Federation of Pakistan & others Date Order with signature of Judge 1. For orders on Misc. No.27790/19 2. For hearing of main case Dated: 11.02.2021 Mr. M. Aslam Bhutta for petitioner. -.-.- Learned counsel for petitioner, under instructions, does not press this petition, which is accordingly dismissed as not pressed along with listed application. Judge Judge
